summary: Attempted to execute V0.8.5 M4 System-Level Architecture Refactor via OMOC Synergy environment ('omoc run'). However, the underlying OMOC engine (v3.17.1) suffers from systemic configuration errors: (1) A persistent zero-width space bug ('Sisyphus - Ultraworker' vs '\u200BSisyphus - Ultraworker') causing 'Agent not found' regardless of the alias provided. (2) Unrecognized model errors for 'openai/gpt-5.4'. (3) Even when falling back to the default 'kimi-k2.5' model and 'general' agent, OMOC throws an internal 'maxOutputTokens must be >= 1' crash. The Orchestrator maintained Strict SoD by rejecting the temptation to manually code the refactor, logging this as a framework-level environment blockade.
